endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/flags
endpoints.description: Lists all available database flags for Cloud SQL instances.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances
endpoints.description: Lists instances under a given project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances
endpoints.description: Creates a new Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}
endpoints.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: PUT /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}
endpoints.description: Updates settings of a Cloud SQL instance. Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: DELETE /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}
endpoints.description: Deletes a Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: PATCH /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}
endpoints.description: Partially updates settings of a Cloud SQL instance by merging the request with the current configuration. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/addServerCa
endpoints.description: Add a new trusted Certificate Authority (CA) version for the specified instance. Required to prepare for a certificate rotation. If a CA version was previously added but never used in a certificate rotation, this operation replaces that version. There cannot be more than one CA version waiting to be rotated in.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/backupRuns
endpoints.description: Lists all backup runs associated with the project or a given instance and configuration in the reverse chronological order of the backup initiation time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/backupRuns
endpoints.description: Creates a new backup run on demand.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/backupRuns/{id}
endpoints.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a backup run.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: DELETE /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/backupRuns/{id}
endpoints.description: Deletes the backup taken by a backup run.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/clone
endpoints.description: Creates a Cloud SQL instance as a clone of the source instance. Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/connectSettings
endpoints.description: Retrieves connect settings about a Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/createEphemeral
endpoints.description: Generates a short-lived X509 certificate containing the provided public key and signed by a private key specific to the target instance. Users may use the certificate to authenticate as themselves when connecting to the database.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/databases
endpoints.description: Lists databases in the specified Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/databases
endpoints.description: Inserts a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/databases/{database}
endpoints.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{DATABASE}} with a real database.

endpoints.name: PUT /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/databases/{database}
endpoints.description: Updates a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{DATABASE}} with a real database.

endpoints.name: DELETE /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/databases/{database}
endpoints.description: Deletes a database from a Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{DATABASE}} with a real database.

endpoints.name: PATCH /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/databases/{database}
endpoints.description: Partially updates a resource containing information about a database inside a Cloud SQL instance. This method supports patch semantics.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{DATABASE}} with a real database.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/demoteMaster
endpoints.description: Demotes the stand-alone instance to be a Cloud SQL read replica for an external database server.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/export
endpoints.description: Exports data from a Cloud SQL instance to a Cloud Storage bucket as a SQL dump or CSV file.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/failover
endpoints.description: Initiates a manual failover of a high availability (HA) primary instance to a standby instance, which becomes the primary instance. Users are then rerouted to the new primary. For more information, see the [Overview of high availability](https://cloud.google.com/sql/docs/mysql/high-availability) page in the Cloud SQL documentation. If using Legacy HA (MySQL only), this causes the instance to failover to its failover replica instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/getDiskShrinkConfig
endpoints.description: Get Disk Shrink Config for a given instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/import
endpoints.description: Imports data into a Cloud SQL instance from a SQL dump or CSV file in Cloud Storage.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/listServerCas
endpoints.description: Lists all of the trusted Certificate Authorities (CAs) for the specified instance. There can be up to three CAs listed: the CA that was used to sign the certificate that is currently in use, a CA that has been added but not yet used to sign a certificate, and a CA used to sign a certificate that has previously rotated out.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/performDiskShrink
endpoints.description: Perform Disk Shrink on primary instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/promoteReplica
endpoints.description: Promotes the read replica instance to be a stand-alone Cloud SQL instance. Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/rescheduleMaintenance
endpoints.description: Reschedules the maintenance on the given instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/resetReplicaSize
endpoints.description: Reset Replica Size to primary instance disk size.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/resetSslConfig
endpoints.description: Deletes all client certificates and generates a new server SSL certificate for the instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/restart
endpoints.description: Restarts a Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/restoreBackup
endpoints.description: Restores a backup of a Cloud SQL instance. Using this operation might cause your instance to restart.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/rotateServerCa
endpoints.description: Rotates the server certificate to one signed by the Certificate Authority (CA) version previously added with the addServerCA method.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/sslCerts
endpoints.description: Lists all of the current SSL certificates for the instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/sslCerts
endpoints.description: Creates an SSL certificate and returns it along with the private key and server certificate authority. The new certificate will not be usable until the instance is restarted.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/sslCerts/{sha1Fingerprint}
endpoints.description: Retrieves a particular SSL certificate. Does not include the private key (required for usage). The private key must be saved from the response to initial creation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{SHA1FINGERPRINT}} with a real sha1fingerprint.

endpoints.name: DELETE /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/sslCerts/{sha1Fingerprint}
endpoints.description: Deletes the SSL certificate. For First Generation instances, the certificate remains valid until the instance is restarted.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{SHA1FINGERPRINT}} with a real sha1fingerprint.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/startExternalSync
endpoints.description: Start External primary instance migration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/startReplica
endpoints.description: Starts the replication in the read replica instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/stopReplica
endpoints.description: Stops the replication in the read replica instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/truncateLog
endpoints.description: Truncate MySQL general and slow query log tables MySQL only.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/users
endpoints.description: Lists users in the specified Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/users
endpoints.description: Creates a new user in a Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: PUT /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/users
endpoints.description: Updates an existing user in a Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: DELETE /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/users
endpoints.description: Deletes a user from a Cloud SQL instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/users/{name}
endpoints.description: Retrieves a resource containing information about a user.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}/verifyExternalSyncSettings
endpoints.description: Verify External primary instance external sync settings.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/instances/{instance}:generateEphemeralCert
endpoints.description: Generates a short-lived X509 certificate containing the provided public key and signed by a private key specific to the target instance. Users may use the certificate to authenticate as themselves when connecting to the database.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{INSTANCE}} with a real instance. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all instance operations that have been performed on the given Cloud SQL instance in the reverse chronological order of the start time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/operations/{operation}
endpoints.description: Retrieves an instance operation that has been performed on an instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{OPERATION}} with a real operation.

endpoints.name: GET /sql/v1beta4/projects/{project}/tiers
endpoints.description: Lists all available machine types (tiers) for Cloud SQL, for example, `db-custom-1-3840`. For related information, see [Pricing](/sql/pricing).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.
